=====On hand=====
This listing is of Ritchie's known {{OBP|Pokémon|species}} in {{aniseries|PTS}}:

{{TrainerPoké
|main=yes
|nick=Sparky
|trainer=Ritchie
|pkmn=Pikachu
|type1=Electric
|img=Ritchie Sparky.png
|epnum=EP078
|epname=A Friend in Deed
|vaen=Satomi Koorogi
|vajp=Satomi Koorogi
|desc='''Sparky''' (Japanese: '''レオン''' ''Leon'') is Ritchie's main Pokémon, a {{p|Pikachu}}. It is distinguished from other Pikachu by a scruff of fur on the top of its head.}}

{{TrainerPoké
|main=yes
|nick=Zippo
|trainer=Ritchie
|pkmn=Charmeleon
|type1=Fire
|img=Ritchie Zippo.png
|epnum=EP078
|epname=A Friend in Deed
|vaen=Eric Stuart
|vajp=Yūji Ueda
|desc='''Zippo''' (Japanese: '''ジッポ''' ''Zippo'') is Ritchie's {{p|Charmeleon}}. It first appeared as a {{p|Charmander}}, and [[Evolution|evolved]] by the time {{Ash}} and Ritchie met in the [[Whirl Islands]].}}

{{TrainerPoké
|nick=Happy
|trainer=Ritchie
|pkmn=Butterfree
|type1=Bug
|type2=Flying
|img=Ritchie Happy.png
|epnum=EP078
|epname=A Friend in Deed
|vaen=Rikako Aikawa
|vajp=Rikako Aikawa
|desc='''Happy''' (Japanese: '''パピー''' ''Papi'') is Ritchie's {{p|Butterfree}}. After Ritchie and {{Ash}} foiled {{TRT}}'s plan to steal the Pokémon of everyone competing in the [[Pokémon League]], the van they were driving in was about to go over a cliff. Ash and Ritchie decided to use their Pokémon to help them land safely. Ash used his {{AP|Pidgeotto}}, while Ritchie sent out Happy. Thanks to their Pokémon, the two Trainers were able to land safely.

Happy reappeared in ''[[EP079|Friend and Foe Alike]]'' during Ash and Ritchie's battle at [[Indigo Plateau]]. It was up against {{AP|Squirtle}}. It easily defeated the {{t|Water}} type by using {{m|Sleep Powder}}, which caused Squirtle to become disqualified. Happy was then defeated by {{AP|Pikachu}} using his {{m|Thunder Shock}}.

Happy was last seen in ''[[EP080|Friends to the End]]'' during Ritchie's battle with [[Assunta]].

Happy's known moves are {{m|Sleep Powder}} and {{m|Whirlwind}}.}}

{{TrainerPoké
|nick=Cruise
|trainer=Ritchie
|pkmn=Pupitar
|type1=Rock
|type2=Ground
|img=Ritchie Cruise.png
|epnum=EP220
|epname=The Mystery is History
|vaen=Eric Stuart
|desc='''Cruise''' (Japanese: '''クルーズ''' ''Cruise'') is Ritchie's {{p|Pupitar}}. It first appeared when [[Butch]] and [[Cassidy]] were attempting to steal [[Silver (Lugia)|a baby Lugia]], but {{Ash}} and Ritchie refused to let that happen. It was very strong in battle, and it caused the two [[Team Rocket]] members to retreat.

Ritchie later used Cruise in ''[[EP222|A Promise is a Promise]]''. Butch and Cassidy were once again trying to prevent the Trainers from rescuing Silver and its {{an|Lugia|mother}}, so Ritchie called upon it to take care of them and the other {{tc|Team Rocket Grunt}}s in the area. After it defeated them, Cruise helped Ash and {{an|Misty}} free Silver from its cage by tackling the bars after [[Ash's Cyndaquil]], {{AP|Totodile}}, and {{TP|Misty|Poliwhirl}} had weakened them.

Cruise's known moves are {{m|Headbutt}} (incorrectly referred to as Take Down in the dub) and {{m|Sandstorm}}.}}

{{TrainerPoké
|nick=Rose
|trainer=Ritchie
|pkmn=Taillow
|type1=Normal
|type2=Flying
|img=Ritchie Rose.png
|epnum=HS08
|epname=Oaknapped!
|vajp=Chinami Nishimura
|vaen=Kayzie Rogers
|desc='''Rose''' (Japanese: '''ローズ''' ''Rose'') is Ritchie's {{p|Taillow}}. When Ritchie, {{Tracey}}, and [[Officer Jenny]] were looking for the missing {{an|Professor Oak}}, Ritchie sent out Rose for help. Tracey commented that {{Ash}} also has a {{AP|Taillow}}, and Ritchie replied that he and Ash tend to catch a lot of the same Pokémon (referring to their {{p|Pikachu}}, {{p|Charmeleon}}, and {{p|Butterfree}}).

In ''[[HS13|Celebi and Joy!]]'', Ritchie used Rose alongside [[Zippo]] and [[Sparky]] to defeat the Pokémon of a [[demolition crew]] who threatened two [[Nurse Joy|Nurses Joy]].

Rose's known moves are {{m|Gust}} (Taillow cannot legally learn Gust in the games) and {{m|Double Team}}.}}
